name: stapel-react
description: Stapel React monorepo: headless frontend pairs for Stapel backend modules

scripts.ci: pnpm gen:check && pnpm lint:css && turbo run lint test build size && pnpm run test:pack
scripts.gen:api: API_SCHEMA=../stapel-auth/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/auth-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-notifications/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/notifications-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-profiles/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/profiles-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-billing/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/billing-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-workspaces/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/workspaces-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-calendar/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/calendar-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-recordings/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/recordings-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs
scripts.gen:api:check: API_SCHEMA=../stapel-auth/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/auth-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-notifications/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/notifications-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-profiles/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/profiles-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-billing/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/billing-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-workspaces/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/workspaces-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-calendar/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/calendar-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-recordings/docs/schema.json API_OUT=packages/recordings-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts node scripts/gen-api.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- packages/auth-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts packages/notifications-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts packages/profiles-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts packages/billing-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts packages/workspaces-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts packages/calendar-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts packages/recordings-react/src/api/generated/schema.ts
scripts.gen:flows: FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-auth/docs/flows.json node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-notifications/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=notifications node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-profiles/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=profiles node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-billing/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=billing node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-workspaces/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=workspaces node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-calendar/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=calendar node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-recordings/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=recordings node scripts/gen-flows.mjs
scripts.gen:flows:check: FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-auth/docs/flows.json node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-notifications/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=notifications node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-profiles/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=profiles node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-billing/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=billing node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-workspaces/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=workspaces node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-calendar/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=calendar node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && FLOWS_JSON=../stapel-recordings/docs/flows.json FLOW_MODULE=recordings node scripts/gen-flows.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- packages/auth-react/src/flows/generated packages/notifications-react/src/flows/generated packages/profiles-react/src/flows/generated packages/billing-react/src/flows/generated packages/workspaces-react/src/flows/generated packages/calendar-react/src/flows/generated packages/recordings-react/src/flows/generated
scripts.gen:errors: node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-notifications/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/notifications-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=NOTIFICATIONS_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Notifications node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-profiles/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/profiles-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=PROFILES_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Profiles node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-billing/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/billing-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=BILLING_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Billing node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-workspaces/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/workspaces-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=WORKSPACES_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Workspaces node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-calendar/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/calendar-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=CALENDAR_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Calendar node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-recordings/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/recordings-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=RECORDINGS_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Recordings node scripts/gen-errors.mjs
scripts.gen:errors:check: node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-notifications/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/notifications-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=NOTIFICATIONS_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Notifications node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-profiles/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/profiles-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=PROFILES_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Profiles node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-billing/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/billing-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=BILLING_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Billing node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-workspaces/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/workspaces-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=WORKSPACES_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Workspaces node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-calendar/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/calendar-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=CALENDAR_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Calendar node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && AUTH_ERRORS_JSON=../stapel-recordings/docs/errors.json ERRORS_OUT=packages/recordings-react/src/i18n/generated ERRORS_CONST=RECORDINGS_ERRORS ERRORS_TYPE_PREFIX=Recordings node scripts/gen-errors.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- packages/auth-react/src/i18n/generated packages/notifications-react/src/i18n/generated packages/profiles-react/src/i18n/generated packages/billing-react/src/i18n/generated packages/workspaces-react/src/i18n/generated packages/calendar-react/src/i18n/generated packages/recordings-react/src/i18n/generated
scripts.gen:events: node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/notifications-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/profiles-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/billing-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/workspaces-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/calendar-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/recordings-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs
scripts.gen:events:check: node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/notifications-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/profiles-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/billing-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/workspaces-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/calendar-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && EVENTS_PKG_DIR=packages/recordings-react node scripts/gen-events.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- packages/auth-react/src/analytics/generated/events.json packages/notifications-react/src/analytics/generated/events.json packages/profiles-react/src/analytics/generated/events.json packages/billing-react/src/analytics/generated/events.json packages/workspaces-react/src/analytics/generated/events.json packages/calendar-react/src/analytics/generated/events.json packages/recordings-react/src/analytics/generated/events.json
scripts.gen:manifest: API_SCHEMA=../stapel-auth/docs/schema.json node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-notifications/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/notifications-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-notifications MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/notifications/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-notifications/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-profiles/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/profiles-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-profiles MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/profiles/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-profiles/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-billing/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/billing-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-billing MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/billing/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-billing/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-workspaces/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/workspaces-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-workspaces MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/workspaces/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-workspaces/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-calendar/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/calendar-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-calendar MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/calendar/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-calendar/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-recordings/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/recordings-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-recordings MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/recordings/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-recordings/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs
scripts.gen:manifest:check: API_SCHEMA=../stapel-auth/docs/schema.json node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-notifications/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/notifications-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-notifications MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/notifications/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-notifications/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-profiles/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/profiles-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-profiles MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/profiles/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-profiles/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-billing/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/billing-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-billing MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/billing/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-billing/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-workspaces/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/workspaces-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-workspaces MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/workspaces/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-workspaces/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-calendar/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/calendar-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-calendar MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/calendar/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-calendar/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && API_SCHEMA=../stapel-recordings/docs/schema.json MANIFEST_PKG_DIR=packages/recordings-react MANIFEST_MODULE=stapel-recordings MANIFEST_TAGPREFIX=/recordings/api/ MANIFEST_BACKEND_PYPROJECT=../stapel-recordings/pyproject.toml node scripts/gen-manifest.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- packages/auth-react/manifest.json packages/auth-react/llms.txt packages/notifications-react/manifest.json packages/notifications-react/llms.txt packages/profiles-react/manifest.json packages/profiles-react/llms.txt packages/billing-react/manifest.json packages/billing-react/llms.txt packages/workspaces-react/manifest.json packages/workspaces-react/llms.txt packages/calendar-react/manifest.json packages/calendar-react/llms.txt packages/recordings-react/manifest.json packages/recordings-react/llms.txt
scripts.gen:tokens:check: node scripts/gen-tokens.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- packages/tokens/src/generated packages/tokens/manifest.json packages/tokens/llms.txt
scripts.gen:demos: node scripts/gen-demos.mjs && DEMOS_PKG_DIR=packages/tokens DEMOS_GATE=0 node scripts/gen-demos.mjs && DEMOS_PKG_DIR=packages/notifications-react node scripts/gen-demos.mjs && DEMOS_PKG_DIR=packages/profiles-react node scripts/gen-demos.mjs && DEMOS_PKG_DIR=packages/billing-react node scripts/gen-demos.mjs && DEMOS_PKG_DIR=packages/workspaces-react node scripts/gen-demos.mjs && DEMOS_PKG_DIR=packages/calendar-react node scripts/gen-demos.mjs && DEMOS_PKG_DIR=packages/recordings-react node scripts/gen-demos.mjs
scripts.gen:demos:check: pnpm gen:demos && git diff --exit-code -- packages/auth-react/demo/generated packages/tokens/demo/generated packages/notifications-react/demo/generated packages/profiles-react/demo/generated packages/billing-react/demo/generated packages/workspaces-react/demo/generated packages/calendar-react/demo/generated packages/recordings-react/demo/generated
scripts.gen: pnpm gen:api && pnpm gen:flows && pnpm gen:errors && pnpm gen:events && pnpm gen:demos && pnpm gen:manifest && pnpm gen:tokens
scripts.gen:check: pnpm gen:api:check && pnpm gen:flows:check && pnpm gen:errors:check && pnpm gen:events:check && pnpm gen:demos:check && pnpm gen:manifest:check && pnpm gen:tokens:check
scripts.version-packages: changeset version && pnpm gen:events && pnpm gen:manifest && pnpm gen:demos
